title: How to build a good thematic portfolio(Workshop)
author: Magic-Mike-2023
selftext:
Hey guys!

Last time there was a lot of interest to the workshop where me and Gabriel showed attendees how to create their own AI strategy that outperforms SP500 in [Alpha Builder](https://builder.limex.com/) . We wanted to do another workshop in January 2026 where we will show **how to build a thematic portfolio based on different Market Trends.** If you interested, leave a comment mentioning date and time (EST) that works for you. We prefer doing it on January 19th or 20th at 8 AM, 10 AM or 4PM . 

I wish everyone Happy Holidays! 🎄🎁
